text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for the race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We resolved the issues from last time together, so
I'm feeling okay now. I'm not nervous at all.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want you to have faith in me, Trainer.
I will definitely triumph!
